info.name: Rizquna ERP API Reference
info.description: OpenAPI reference for the Rizquna Publishing platform, author portal, digital library, and administration APIs.

item.name: Handles the API request and renders the Swagger documentation view.
Handles the OAuth2 callback and retrieves the required file for the redirect.

API Login - Returns token for SPA/Mobile
Accepts: email, username, or login (auto-detect)

request.description:
Register a new author with complete profile.
This creates both User and Author profile in one transaction.

item.name:
GET /api/v1/auth/google/redirect
Redirect user to Google's OAuth consent screen.

GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback
Handle the callback from Google, create/login user, return token.

request.description:
SECURITY FIXES:
1. Prevent account takeover (email enumeration)
2. Use fragment (#) instead of query (?) for token
3. Remove stateless() for CSRF protection

item.name: Track a book by tracking code.

GET /api/v1/public/site-content
Returns all active site content grouped by section.

GET /api/v1/public/catalog
Returns published books for the landing page catalog.

GET /api/v1/public/catalog/grouped
Returns books grouped by category for the homepage.

GET /api/v1/public/catalog/{id}
Returns a single book detail for public view.

GET /api/v1/public/categories
Returns active categories with book count.

GET /api/v1/public/authors
Returns featured authors for the landing page.

GET /api/v1/public/stats
Returns aggregate stats for the landing page.

GET /api/v1/public/blog
Returns published announcements/articles for the blog page.

GET /api/v1/public/blog/{id}
Returns a single blog post detail.

GET /api/v1/public/repository
Daftar buku mode akademis (untuk sitasi).

GET /api/v1/public/repository/{slug}/cite?format=apa
Get sitasi dalam format tertentu.

GET /api/v1/public/repository
Daftar buku mode akademis (untuk sitasi).

GET /api/v1/public/repository/{slug}/cite?format=apa
Get sitasi dalam format tertentu.
Handle logout for both API and Web

GET /api/v1/user/library
Daftar buku yang sudah dibeli/diakses user.

POST /api/v1/user/request-author-verification
User mengajukan verifikasi sebagai penulis.
Get consolidated stats for the React Dashboard.

GET /api/v1/admin/authors/without-account
List all authors that don't have a user account yet.

POST /api/v1/admin/authors/{author}/create-account
Create a user account for the given author.
List all authors (with pagination, search, filter).
Delete an author (only if no books).
ISBN tracking: books in ISBN-related statuses.
Trigger parse metadata akademik untuk buku tertentu.
